_comment: PostToolUse hook that saves current task state after each file edit. Creates .claude/session-state.md with a timestamp and the file that was just edited. Combine with session-start-restore.json for full session persistence.

hooks.command: mkdir -p .claude && echo "## Session State - $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" > .claude/session-state.md && echo "Last edited: $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "Current branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" >> .claude/session-state.md && git diff --stat 2>/dev/null >> .claude/session-state.md || true
